text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
When Mejiro Dober sees how popular Air Groove
is with the crowd, she realizes she's far from the
legacy she dreams of forging, but she manages to
keep her spirits up.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Dober can't quite conceal her admiration
for Air Groove as she vows to get closer to her
ideal.
